attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon-EX, switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: The bone it holds is its key weapon. It throws the bone skillfully like a boomerang to KO targets.

name: Duskull

abilities.name: Spiritborne Evolution
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may discard 3 cards from your hand. If you do, search your deck for a card that evolves from this Pokémon and put it onto this Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Ominous Eyes
attacks.text: Put 2 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavorText: It doggedly pursues its prey wherever it goes. However, the chase is abandoned at sunrise.

name: Honchkrow

attacks.name: Feint Attack
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, or any other effects on that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Raven's Claw
attacks.text: This attack does 10 more damage for each damage counter on all of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavorText: A single cry from this nocturnal Pokémon, and more than a hundred of its Murkrow cronies will assemble.

name: Klang

attacks.name: Charge Beam
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, attach an Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Spinning minigears are rotated at high speed and repeatedly fired away. It is dangerous if the gears don't return.

abilities.name: Saturation
abilities.text: When you attach a Water Energy card from your hand to Wooper, remove all Special Conditions and 1 damage counter from Wooper.

name: Groudon-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Rip Claw
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Smokescreen
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

name: Energy Restore
rules: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, put a Basic Energy card from your discard pile into your hand. If you don't have that many basic Energy cards in your discard pile, put all of them into your hand.

name: Dustox ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Safeguard
abilities.text: Prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Dustox ex by your opponent's Pokémon-ex.

attacks.name: Silver Wind
attacks.text: During your next turn, if an attack does damage to the Defending Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance), that attack does 30 more damage.

name: Pikachu

attacks.name: Thunder Wave
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: A plan was recently announced to gather many Pikachu and make an electric power plant.

attacks.name: Poison Needle
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Latios-GX
rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Power Bind
abilities.text: If you have 4 or fewer Pokémon in play, this Pokémon can't attack.

attacks.name: Tag Purge
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from TAG TEAM Pokémon.

attacks.name: Clear Vision-GX
attacks.text: For the rest of this game, your opponent can't use any GX attacks. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

name: Dragonite

attacks.name: Deafen
attacks.text: Your opponent can't play any Item cards from his or her hand during his or her next turn.

attacks.name: Healwing
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: It is said to make its home somewhere in the sea. It guides crews of shipwrecks to shore.

name: Pokémon Center Lady
rules: Heal 60 damage and remove all Special Conditions from 1 of your Pokémon.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Minior

abilities.name: Falling Star
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if this Pokémon is in your hand and your Bench isn't full, you may move your Active Pokémon to your Bench and play this Pokémon as your new Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Swift
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, or any other effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: Strong impacts can knock it out of its shell. This Pokémon was born from mutated nanoparticles.

name: Grimer

attacks.name: Gunky
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

flavorText: It was born when sludge in a dirty stream was exposed to the moon's X-rays. It appears among filth.

attacks.name: Quick Turn
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Cross-Cut
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is an Evolved Pokémon, this attack does 20 damage plus 20 more damage.

name: Tentacool

attacks.name: Gentle Wrap
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: It drifts aimlessly in waves. Very difficult to see in water, it may not be noticed until it stings.

name: Full Heal
rules: Remove all Special Conditions from your Active Pokémon.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Clefairy

attacks.name: Moonblast
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done by attacks from the Defending Pokémon is reduced by 10 (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: It is said that happiness will come to those who see a gathering of Clefairy dancing under a full moon.

abilities.name: Evolution Memories
abilities.text: Espeon can use the attacks of all Pokémon you have in play that evolve from Eevee as its own. (You still need the necessary Energy to use each attack.)

attacks.name: Solar Ray
attacks.text: Remove 1 damage counter from each of your Pokémon.

name: Lugia BREAK
rules: BREAK Evolution Rule: Lugia BREAK retains the attacks, Abilities, Weakness, Resistance, and Retreat Cost of its previous Evolution.

attacks.name: Flash of Destruction
attacks.text: Discard 2 Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Sunkern

attacks.name: Sunbathe
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, remove all damage counters from Sunkern. Search your deck for a card that evolves from Sunkern and attach that card to Sunkern. This counts as evolving Sunkern. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: It is very small and powerless. If attacked, the best it can do is flap its leaves in an attempt to frighten away its enemies.

attacks.name: Spiral Wave
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Registeel-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Triple Laser
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage to 3 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Protect Charge
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Lunatone

abilities.name: Gravity Change
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may discard a card from your hand. Then, if you have Solrock in play, draw a card. This power can't be used if Lunatone is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Knock Over
attacks.text: You may discard any Stadium card in play.

flavorText: Because it turns active on nights of the full moon, it is said to have some link to the lunar phases.

name: Dwebble

attacks.name: Flail
attacks.text: Does 10 damage times the number of damage counters on this Pokémon.

flavorText: When it finds a stone of a suitable size, it secretes a liquid from its mouth to open up a hole to crawl into.

name: Misdreavus

attacks.name: Take Back
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, search your discard pile for a Trainer card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand.

flavorText: A Pokémon that startles people in the middle of the night. It gathers fear as its energy.

name: Palkia

attacks.name: Cross Slicer
attacks.text: Your opponent can't attach Energy from his or her hand to the Defending Pokémon during his or her next turn.

flavorText: It has the ability to distort space. It is described as a deity in Sinnoh-region mythology.

name: PlusPower
rules: Attach PlusPower to your Active Pokémon. At the end of your turn, discard PlusPower. If this Pokémon's attack does damage to the Defending Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance), the attack does 10 more damage to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Energy Ark
rules: Flip 2 coins. For each heads, search your deck for a Basic Energy card. Show that card to your opponent, then put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Magneton

attacks.name: Zap Cannon
attacks.text: This Pokémon can't use Zap Cannon during your next turn.

flavorText: It has about three times the electrical power of Magnemite. For some reason, outbreaks of this Pokémon happen when lots of sunspots appear.

name: Galarian Corsola

attacks.name: Cursed Drop
attacks.text: Put 3 damage counters on your opponent's Pokémon in any way you like.

flavorText: Watch your step when wandering areas oceans once covered. What looks like a stone could be this Pokémon, and it will curse you if you kick it.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage.

attacks.name: Ink Spurt
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, whenever the Defending Pokémon tries to attack, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing. (This effect lasts until the Defending Pokémon evolves or is Benched.)

attacks.name: Amnesia
attacks.text: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. That Pokémon can't use that attack during your opponent's next turn.

name: Professor Oak's New Theory
rules: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.
Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 6 cards.

name: Rainbow Energy
rules: Attach Rainbow Energy to 1 of your Pokémon. While in play, Rainbow Energy counts as every type of basic Energy but only provides 1 Energy at a time. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card when not in play.) When you attach this card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon, it does 10 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance.)

attacks.name: Minimize
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to Shellder by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Alolan Exeggutor-GX
rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Tropical Head
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage times the amount of Energy attached to this Pokémon to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Dragon Hammer
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Tower-Go-Round-GX
attacks.text: Move any number of Energy from your Pokémon to your other Pokémon in any way you like. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

name: Koffing

attacks.name: Foul Odor
attacks.text: Both Active Pokémon are now Confused.

flavorText: Its thin, balloon-like body is inflated by horribly toxic gases. It reeks when it is nearby.
